title: deschampsia cespitosa var. brevifolia
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa var. brevifolia, also known as Tufted Hair Grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm various health issues. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Deschampsia cespitosa var. brevifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
